reviews.author: Aditya Kapoor
reviews.title: Quality Expected Se Better Thi
reviews.body: Sach kahu to online order karne me hesitation tha, lekin frame dekhkar pura doubt clear ho gaya.

reviews.author: Sai Gupta
reviews.title: Minimal Yet Attractive
reviews.body: Simple hone ke baad bhi standout karta hai.

reviews.author: Harsh Singh
reviews.body: Living room ke liye liya tha. Real me kaafi decent lagta hai. Definitely recommend karunga.

reviews.author: Divya Saxena
reviews.body: Har type ke decor ke saath suit kar jata hai.
